meaning: n.(约有12个座位)中客车,小型公共汽车,面包车
examples: The front of me was a microbus.
The research on the air conditioning matching of HAISHI SY-6480 microbus.
To fund their business, Jobs sold his Volkswagen microbus. Wozniak sold his calculator.
He recently bought a "Microbus" -- better known as a campervan.
